ARTICLE_TITLE: Samsung Unveils Revolutionary Foldable Display Technology at Seoul Tech Expo 2026
ARTICLE_BODY: Samsung Electronics made headlines at the Seoul Tech Expo 2026 by unveiling its groundbreaking triple-fold smartphone technology. The new device features a screen that can fold in three sections, creating a tablet-sized display when fully opened. Company executives demonstrated the durability of the new hinge mechanism, which can withstand over 500,000 fold cycles. The prototype showcases Samsung's commitment to maintaining its leadership in the global smartphone market. Industry analysts predict this innovation could revolutionize mobile computing by 2027. The device runs on Samsung's new OneUI 8.0 interface, specifically optimized for multi-screen functionality. The company announced plans to begin mass production in early 2027, with initial market release expected in South Korea and the United States. This technological breakthrough represents Samsung's answer to increasing competition from Chinese manufacturers in the foldable phone segment.
